calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Jun-14-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Cyrus Tabari, Esq. 408-288-9700 of Sheuerman, Martini, Tabari, Zenere & Garvin for Plaintiff John Edward Massey.
Carolyne Evans, Deputy Attorney General 415-510-3448 of the Office of the Attorney General for Defendant Medical Board of California.

Petitioner's hearing on Petition for Writ of Mandamus is argued and taken under submission. Court to notify counsel of its ruling via mail on June 28, 2019. JUDGE ERIC FLEMING; Clerk: Dennis Vegas, CSR: Irene Tofft #12913

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE - TRIAL COURTS
Off Calendar Sep-24-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Cyrus Tabari, Esq. (408-288-9700) of Sheuerman, Martini, Tabari, Zenere & Garvin for Plaintiff John Edward Massey, MD.
Carolyne Evans, Deputy Attorney General (415-510-3448) of the Office of the Attorney General for Defendant Medical Board of California.

Case management hearing held. Court sets the following briefing schedule for opening briefs, opposition, and reply.

Petitioner's Opening brief shall be filed by Jan-21-2019 with a limit of 30 pages,
Respondent's Opposition shall be filed by Feb-05-2019 with a limit of 30 pages,
Petitioner's Reply brief will be filed by Feb-15-2019 with a page limit of 10 pages.

Plaintiff to submit exhibits on or after Oct-09-2018.

Parties waive provision 2337 and hearing on the merits is set for February 25, 2019 at 1:30 p.m in Dept 514.

Plaintiff lodged Office of Administrative Hearings Clerk's transcripts and Reporter's transcripts with the court.

Case Management Conference is off calendar as no further CMC is required. Plaintiff to submit a proposed Stipulation and Order for Court signature. Judge: Eric R. Fleming, Clerk: A. Mok. Not Reported. (514)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE - TRIAL COURTS
Off Calendar Sep-10-2018 Continued To Sep-24-18 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE - TRIAL COURTS
Off Calendar Aug-24-2018 Single Assignment

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Assign Matter To A Single Assignment Judge
Off Calendar Aug-24-2018 Text Ruling

Plaintiff'S Motion To Stay The Order Of The Medical Board To Revoke Dr. Massey'S Medical License.
Off Calendar May-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Cyrus Tabari, Esq. 408-288-9700 of Sheuerman, Martini, Tabari, Zenere & Garvin for Plaintiff John Edward Massey.
Carolyne Evans, Deputy Attorney General 415-510-3448 of the Office of the Attorney General for Defendant Medical Board of California.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Defendant argues, Public may be harmed, cites case. Plaintiff argues delay, sanctions too harsh, cites case.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Petitioner John Edward Massey, M.D.'s Motion To Stay The Order Of The Medical Board To Revoke the Medical License of Dr. Massey, M.D.

Taken under submission.* (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, cjordan@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/RBU)

*After the hearing the Court prepares and signs an Order granting request for stay. (see scanned order for details)*
